languages.text: "Аугментика..." {n}Иждриг фыркает, но дальше мысль не развивает.{/n} "Снаряжение нам нужно, тут не поспоришь. Стрелять из лазружья, когда есть запасная батарея и даже не одна — это чистое наслаждение".
"Augmetics..." {n}Izdrig snorts, but doesn't elaborate.{/n} "We need the equipment, no doubt about that. Firing a lasgun when you've got a spare battery or two is the closest thing to real joy."
languages.original_text: "Аугментика..." {n}Иждриг фыркает, но дальше мысль не развивает.{/n} "Снаряжение нам нужно, тут не поспоришь. Стрелять из лазружья, когда есть запасная батарея и даже не одна — это чистое наслаждение".

traits.locale_text: "Augmetics..." {n}Izdrig snorts, but doesn't elaborate further.{/n} "We need the equipment, no doubt about that. Firing a lasgun when you've got a spare battery or even more is pure joy."
"Augmetics..." {n}Izdrig snorts, but doesn't elaborate.{/n} "We need the equipment, no doubt about that. Firing a lasgun when you've got a spare battery or two is the closest thing to real joy."
"Augmetics will make us dependent on the cogs — we've been there before with the First Call-Up. But we need the rest of the equipment — there's no way around that."
"Augmetics..." {n}Izdrig snorts, but doesn't elaborate further.{/n} "We need the equipment, no doubt about that. Firing a lasgun when you've got a spare battery or even more is pure joy."
"Augmetics..." {n}Izdrig snorts, but doesn't elaborate.{/n} "We need the equipment, no doubt about that. Firing a lasgun when you've got a spare battery or two is the closest thing to real joy."

languages.text: 「拡張機能は、我々を歯車に依存させるだろう。ファーストコールアップの時もそうだった。しかし、我々は他の機器も必要とする。それは避けられない」
languages.original_text: "Augmetics will make us dependent on the cogs — we've been there before with the First Call-Up. But we need the rest of the equipment — there's no way around that."

languages.text: "Ogmetikler..." {n}İzdrig burnundan solusa da konuyu uzatmıyor.{/n} "Ekipmana ihtiyacımız var, orası kesin. Yanınızda fazladan bir veya iki yedek batarya varken silazer ateşlemek insanın keyfini yerine getirir."
languages.original_text: "Augmetics..." {n}Izdrig snorts, but doesn't elaborate.{/n} "We need the equipment, no doubt about that. Firing a lasgun when you've got a spare battery or two is the closest thing to real joy."

traits.locale_text: "Ogmetikler..." {n}İzdrig burnundan solusa da konuyu uzatmıyor.{/n} "Ekipmana ihtiyacımız var, orası kesin. Yanınızda fazladan bir veya iki yedek batarya varken silazer ateşlemek insanın keyfini yerine getirir."

languages.text: “植入物……”{n}伊兹德里格嗤了一声，但没多说什么。{/n}“我们确实需要装备。兜里揣着一两块备用电池再扣动激光枪，那滋味比什么都快活。”
languages.original_text: "Augmetics..." {n}Izdrig snorts, but doesn't elaborate.{/n} "We need the equipment, no doubt about that. Firing a lasgun when you've got a spare battery or two is the closest thing to real joy."

traits.locale_text: “植入物……”{n}伊兹德里格嗤了一声，但没多说什么。{/n}“我们确实需要装备。兜里揣着一两块备用电池再扣动激光枪，那滋味比什么都快活。”

languages.text: "Augmentationen ..." {n}Izdrig schnaubt, sagt aber weiter nichts.{/n} "Wir brauchen die Ausrüstung, daran besteht kein Zweifel. Mit einem Lasergewehr zu feuern, wenn man ein, zwei Batterien übrig hat, kommt wahrer Freude ziemlich nahe."
languages.original_text: "Augmetics..." {n}Izdrig snorts, but doesn't elaborate.{/n} "We need the equipment, no doubt about that. Firing a lasgun when you've got a spare battery or two is the closest thing to real joy."

traits.locale_text: "Augmentationen ..." {n}Izdrig schnaubt, sagt aber weiter nichts.{/n} "Wir brauchen die Ausrüstung, daran besteht kein Zweifel. Mit einem Lasergewehr zu feuern, wenn man ein, zwei Batterien übrig hat, kommt wahrer Freude ziemlich nahe."

languages.text: « Des augmétiques... » {n}Izdrig ricane, mais ne dit rien de plus.{/n} « Nous avons besoin de ces équipements, ça ne fait aucun doute. Avoir des batteries de rechange pour nos fusils laser ne serait pas de refus. »
languages.original_text: "Augmetics..." {n}Izdrig snorts, but doesn't elaborate.{/n} "We need the equipment, no doubt about that. Firing a lasgun when you've got a spare battery or two is the closest thing to real joy."

traits.locale_text: « Des augmétiques... » {n}Izdrig ricane, mais ne dit rien de plus.{/n} « Nous avons besoin de ces équipements, ça ne fait aucun doute. Avoir des batteries de rechange pour nos fusils laser ne serait pas de refus. »

languages.text: «Auméticos...». {n}Izdrig resopla, pero no añade ni una palabra.{/n} «Necesitamos el equipo; de eso no hay duda. Disparar un rifle láser cuando tienes un par de baterías de repuesto es lo más cercano a la felicidad pura».
languages.original_text: "Augmetics..." {n}Izdrig snorts, but doesn't elaborate.{/n} "We need the equipment, no doubt about that. Firing a lasgun when you've got a spare battery or two is the closest thing to real joy."

traits.locale_text: «Auméticos...». {n}Izdrig resopla, pero no añade ni una palabra.{/n} «Necesitamos el equipo; de eso no hay duda. Disparar un rifle láser cuando tienes un par de baterías de repuesto es lo más cercano a la felicidad pura».
